The '''Vax Mining Group''' was a consortium that employed [[Slavery/Legends|slave labor]] in its [[Mining/Legends|mining]] operations. The [[Slaver/Legends|slaver]] [[Slar-dan ti Gardi]] once sold two [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]] [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] representatives, [[Krotorra]] and [[Lamorrack]], to the group before fleeing the region.
